package.name: ipa_building_navigation
package.description: This package plans the navigation through the building in the autopnp-scenario. It includes: 1. An A-star pathplanning algorithm for finding the shortest way between two points in a grid map. 2. TSP-solving functions for minimal-time path planning in segmented maps. Includes nearest-neighbor, genetic solver, and Concorde-TSP-solver.
package.author: Florian Jordan
package.license: LGPL for academic and non-commercial use; for commercial use, please contact Fraunhofer IPA
